title: SaaS Analytics Suite
summary: Dashboard platform for subscription and usage intelligence.
description: Led the frontend architecture for a modular analytics dashboard with live charts, role-based access, and highly configurable reporting widgets. Optimized performance budgets and improved loading speed across key flows.

title: Fintech Onboarding Flow
summary: Conversion-focused onboarding experience for a digital banking app.
description: Designed and implemented a multi-step onboarding journey with identity checks, progress persistence, and clear validation feedback. Reduced drop-off in critical steps and increased approved account completion.

title: Headless Commerce Storefront
summary: Composable e-commerce storefront with fast product discovery.
description: Built a storefront with instant search, filtering, and a streamlined cart experience. Implemented design tokens and reusable components to speed up experimentation and campaign launches.

title: Healthcare Patient Portal
summary: Secure portal experience for appointments and records.
description: Shipped a privacy-aware portal for appointment booking, secure document sharing, and messaging with care providers. Focused on accessibility and robust feedback states for patients of all profiles.
